positive: Minimalist geometric design featuring a stylized, bioluminescent forest scene. The central element is a cluster of interlocking, abstract woodland shapes (leaves, branches, crystalline flora) rendered in deep indigo and ethereal teal, contrasted sharply against a muted cream or pale beige background. The composition should be symmetrical and highly balanced, suitable for a centered chest print. Style should be a blend of art deco and modern spiritualism, with clean, sharp lines and crisp color blocking. Use negative space intentionally to enhance the silhouettes. Emphasize a glowing, internal light source effect (bioluminescence) within the flora elements. Clean vector aesthetic, high contrast, flat graphic quality, designed for screen printing on fabric.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, blur, noise, text, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, low quality, messy, grayscale, dirty, artifacts
